subject: feat(pwa): close all 16 gaps from few-lap comparison
body:
Line-by-line comparison with few-lap's PWA implementation identified
16 differences. All addressed:

Update flow:
- dismissUpdate() — dismiss without applying
- _isChecking state + pwa-checking-update event
- offlineReady auto-dismiss (3s)

Install:
- __pwaPromptReceived diagnostic flag (HTML + pwa.js)
- display-mode change listener for browser-menu installs
- Install analytics (trackInstallEvent, last 50 in localStorage)
- dismissInstall() persistent to localStorage
- Chrome 90-day cooldown note in install instructions
- 5s diagnostic timeout for missing beforeinstallprompt
- 2-layer capture decision documented (Vite vs Metro)

Infrastructure:
- pwaConstants.js — all timing/threshold constants extracted
- offline.html — branded offline fallback (precached)
- Recovery script: watches updatefound + installing workers,
  clears counter on successful mount
- vercel.json: Cache-Control no-cache for HTML/sw.js/manifest,
  immutable for hashed assets, Service-Worker-Allowed for sw.js

Tags: pwa, cross-project, resilience, install
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-hardening
Semver: minor
